text:
Setting
Default Value
tick_interval_ms
1000ms (1 second)
signals_history_capacity
10 samples
Total time window = 10 samples × 1 second = 10 seconds
So when the policy checks "are ALL samples over threshold?", it's asking: "has this signal been elevated for the entire last 10 seconds?"

191
[10]
- 10-second sliding window -
Overload declared only if ALL 10 exceed threshold
This prevents reacting to brief spikes - the system must be consistently overloaded for 10 seconds before rate limiting kicks in.
